title: Visa Information
description: Schengen visa guidance for Indian citizens travelling to Belgium.

items.title: Belgium Schengen Tourist / Short-Stay Visa
items.description: Belgium is a full member of the Schengen Area. A single Type C visa lets you stay up to 90 days within any 180-day period across all Schengen countries, for tourism, family visits or business.
eligibility: Indian passport holders travelling for tourism, family visits, or short business trips
Not applicable for stays longer than 90 days (see national long-stay visas for work/study)
documents: Passport valid for at least 3 months beyond intended departure from Schengen area, issued within the last 10 years, with 2 blank pages
Completed and signed Schengen visa application form
Travel/medical insurance covering at least €30,000, valid across the Schengen area
Proof of accommodation (hotel bookings or invitation letter)
Cover letter stating purpose and itinerary of travel
Proof of sufficient funds (bank statements for last 3-6 months)
Proof of employment/business or student status in India
Civil status documents where relevant (e.g. marriage certificate for family visits)
items.processingTime: Typically 15 calendar days from a complete application; can extend up to 30-60 days during peak season or if additional checks are required.

fee.notes: Children aged 6-12: €45. Children under 6: free. Fees are paid in INR equivalent at the VFS centre.

items.validity: Up to 90 days within any 180-day period, multiple-entry depending on issuance.

steps.title: Check eligibility & gather documents
steps.description: Confirm Belgium is your main Schengen destination (longest stay or first entry point), then collect all required documents.

steps.title: Book a VFS Global appointment
steps.description: Apply online via vfsglobal.com/belgium/india and book a biometrics appointment at your nearest centre.

steps.title: Attend the appointment
steps.description: Submit documents, pay the fee, and provide biometrics (fingerprints and photo) if not on file from the last 5 years.

steps.title: Track and collect
steps.description: Track your application online and collect your passport once the decision is made, or opt for courier delivery.
